title: Regolamenti dwar Recognised Incorporated Cell Companies taħt l-Att dwar il-Kumpanniji

provisions.content:
COMPANIES ACT
(RECOGNISED INCORPORATED CELL COMPANIES)

[ L.S.386.15

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 386.15
REGOLAMENTI DWAR RECOGNISED
INCORPORATED CELL COMPANIES
TAĦT L-ATT DWAR IL-KUMPANNIJI*
17 ta’ April, 2012
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 119 tal-2012, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 292 tal2025.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
